subject: feat(ux): add BottomSheet keyboard avoidance and content-area drag
body:
- Keyboard avoidance: snaps to full on keyboard show, restores position
  on dismiss. Uses Keyboard listeners (native) and visualViewport
  resize (web mobile fallback)
- Content-area drag: PanResponder on content captures downward drags
  when inner FlatList is scrolled to top, or any drag when sheet is
  not fully expanded. Handle drag unchanged
- Accepts contentScrollOffset ref to track inner scroll position

Tags: ux, bottom-sheet, keyboard, drag
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: neutral
Epic: ux
Semver: minor
